steps.title: Spot the defining difference
steps.content: The sculptures differ most distinctly in their subject matter: Frudakis's Freedom Sculpture shows human figures, while McCracken's Diminish and Ascend shows an architectural element. This is the key difference that enables a meaningful contrast.

steps.title: Apply the contrast to the choices
steps.content: Choice B identifies exactly this difference: Frudakis's work includes human subjects while McCracken's does not. The other options either create false contrasts, emphasize shared characteristics, or describe only one sculpture. That matches choice B — B is correct.
